intro: Geraniospermum multibracteatum, commonly known as the Small-fruited Geranium, is a plant species belonging to the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to the relief of various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
